title: UserAuthCertificate - Metadata API
description: Represents a PEM-encoded user certificate. These certificates are associated with a user, and externally uploaded. The uploaded certificate is used to authenticate the user.

developerName.description: The name of the certificate with an underscore between words. Note: Only users with View DeveloperName OR View Setup and Configuration permission can view, group, sort, and filter this field.

expirationDate.description: The date on which the certificate expires.

masterLabel.description: A user-friendly name that you create for the certificate. Limited to 64 characters.

serialNumber.description: The serial number for the certificate.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="MetadataWithContent">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="content" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:base64Binary"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="UserAuthCertificate">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:MetadataWithContent">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="developerName" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="expirationDate" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:dateTime"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="serialNumber" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="user" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
